overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a Space Marine navigating a storm-ravaged jungle battlefield at the Kadaku Hydra Militarum Outpost. The character moves from observation through muddy terrain into intense melee combat with alien tyranids, utilizing special abilities alongside allied soldiers.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal stormy sky and location text 'KADAKU' appears
character transitions from standing to running forward into the battlefield

agents.ego_description: Space Marine observing the devastated battlefield, looking up at the stormy sky, then beginning to advance through the mud

entered.detail: tan canvas tent partially collapsed on the left side of the path
jagged rock formation rising behind the camp area
small fires burning amidst the debris of the outpost
wrecked armored vehicle with scorch marks on the hull
dark teal storm clouds covering the sky with rain visible
coils of barbed wire fencing along the right side of the path
dense tropical foliage lining the edge of the battlefield

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a Space Marine standing at the edge of a devastated military outpost under a stormy teal sky. The camera pans up to reveal dark clouds and location text, then the character begins running forward through muddy terrain past burning debris, military tents, and destroyed vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: active battlefield approach with allied troops

events.description: red enemy laser fire becomes visible in the distance ahead
character draws melee weapon and prepares to engage enemies

agents.ego_description: running through deep mud alongside allied Imperial Guard soldiers toward enemy positions

notable_agents.action: allied soldier in tan armor running alongside the Space Marine toward the front line

entered.detail: defensive wall of sandbags stacked as a barrier
scattered wreckage and equipment littering the muddy ground
armored transport vehicle engulfed in flames

segments.scene_description: The Space Marine runs through the muddy battlefield alongside allied soldiers, approaching active combat. Enemy laser fire becomes visible in the distance as the character moves past sandbag fortifications and burning vehicles, transitioning from observation to combat approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: close quarters combat zone with tyranid enemies

events.description: tutorial text 'RIGHTEOUS FURY ABILITY' appears on screen indicating special move availability
character activates blue energy aura ability and executes heavy melee attacks on enemies

agents.ego_description: engaging tyranid warriors in close combat with chainsword, executing dodges and special ability attacks

notable_agents.action: large tyranid creature attacking with claws and tentacles

entered.detail: bomb craters filled with muddy water dotting the combat zone
large uprooted tree trunk lying across the ground
intense fires consuming destroyed military equipment

segments.scene_description: Intense melee combat erupts as the Space Marine engages tyranid creatures in a cratered battlefield. The character activates a glowing blue special ability and fights through enemies with a chainsword, while fire and smoke obscure the sky. Tutorial text appears indicating ability usage.

events.description: screen edges flash red indicating character has taken damage
character joins a squad of fellow Space Marines for coordinated advance

agents.ego_description: fighting through enemy lines alongside fellow Space Marines, executing melee attacks while advancing through the devastated terrain

notable_agents.action: fellow Space Marine in blue power armor fighting alongside the player

entered.detail: damaged but intact armored vehicle near the tree line
large decaying tree trunk providing cover

segments.scene_description: The Space Marine continues fighting through the battlefield alongside squad mates, taking damage as indicated by red screen flashes. The character moves past battlefield ruins and destroyed vehicles, coordinating with other Space Marines to push through the enemy lines in the stormy, fire-lit jungle environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet edge of a devastated military outpost into the heart of a chaotic, fire-lit jungle battlefield. It begins with a pan toward a stormy teal sky before the camera tracks a Space Marine running through muddy terrain past burning debris and destroyed vehicles. As the character advances alongside allied soldiers, the scene shifts from observation to an active combat approach, moving past sandbag fortifications while enemy laser fire streaks across the distance. The environment then erupts into intense melee combat within a cratered landscape, where the camera captures the flash of a glowing blue special ability and the swing of a chainsword amidst obscuring smoke and fire. Finally, the movement pushes through enemy lines and battlefield ruins, marked by red flashes of damage as the squad coordinates their assault under the oppressive storm.
